positive: A minimalist, geometric illustration of a whimsical fox silhouette perched on a stylized crescent moon. The fox and moon are depicted using thick, continuous line art and negative space, creating a strong, contrasting pattern. The background should be a solid, deep teal color, enhancing the contrast. Focus on perfect symmetry and clean, crisp lines suitable for screen printing. Style: Modern vector art, clean graphic novel aesthetic, mid-century modern influence. Composition: Central and balanced. Lighting: Flat, even studio light, maximizing silhouette definition. Color Direction: Limited palette of cream, black, and deep teal.
